assertions.assertion: Calls AddLocalApiAuthentication() to set up local API authentication
Mentions that clients must include 'IdentityServerApi' in their AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states clients must include IdentityServerApi in AllowedScopes with code example showing AllowedScopes = { "openid", "profile", "IdentityServerApi" }

assertions.assertion: Warns that local API authentication only works when the API is co-hosted with IdentityServer, not for separate API hosts
assertions.rationale: Explicitly warns: 'Local API authentication only works when the API is co-hosted with IdentityServer' and recommends JWT bearer or introspection for separate hosts
